subject: A tall carved stone monolith or obelisk bearing intricate relief carvings of a beast with a large maw, geometric knotwork, scrollwork, and stylized animal imagery, standing in a misty forest
description: A tall conical stone monolith dominates the scene, covered in dense relief carvings: a large roaring beast near the apex, geometric knotwork patterns filling the body, and a broad stylized creature form at the base with upswept flanking shapes. The stone is weathered gray-brown with carved depth creating strong shadow lines. The background is a misty temperate forest with tall trees and green canopy light filtering through. The monument stands on a low base; a coiled stone shape is visible at lower right. The overall palette is cool gray stone against warm green forest.
foreground: carved stone monolith with beast and knotwork relief carvings
background: misty forest with tall trees and green canopy
